headline: How Akamai’s (AKAM) Blackwell GPU Buildout Expands Its Distributed AI Platform Ambitions
summary: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM) is one of the best rising AI stocks to buy now. On March 3, 2026, Akamai Technologies, Inc. announced that it would deploy thousands of NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs to expand its global distributed cloud infrastructure. The company said the move is aimed at creating one of the world’s most widely distributed […]
